source.section: Part 15 - Navigation & Case III Recovery > 7 - ADF (Automatic Direction Finder) Navigation

steps.action: Left click on the COMM1 knob to pull it and select COMM1 Radio
steps.voiced: Pull the COMM1 knob to select COMM1 Radio.

steps.action: Scroll mousewheel on COMM1 Radio Channel Selector to M (Manual) Mode
steps.voiced: Set COMM1 Radio Channel Selector to Manual mode.

steps.action: Press the OSB next to FM (":" will appear when selected)
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to FM — confirm colon appears.

steps.action: Press CLR on the UFC to clear current frequency
steps.voiced: Press CLR on the UFC to clear the current frequency.

steps.action: Type "113600" on the UFC to set ADF frequency 113.6 MHz
steps.voiced: Enter the ADF frequency on the UFC scratchpad.

steps.action: Press ENT on the UFC to enter this frequency
steps.voiced: Press ENT to enter the frequency.

steps.action: You will now see a circle on the HSI compass rose. This is the heading towards the ADF beacon.
steps.voiced: Confirm ADF bearing circle appears on the HSI compass rose.
